creator: sjorge+signup@blackdot.be
text:
Created attachment 185762
sysutils/u-boot-orangepi-zero/Makefile

There is no port yet for the orangepi-zero which is an Allwinner H2+ based board.
It very close to H3 boards like the NanoPi NEO. However it lacks Gigabit Ethernet.

It comes with Wifi And Fast Ethernet, both of those are not working.
However everything else seems to work fine.
